nasb.text: And the slave said, ‘Master, what you commanded has been done, and still there is room.’

esv.text: And the servant said, ‘Sir, what you commanded has been done, and still there is room.’

cnv.text: 僕人說：‘主啊，你所吩咐的已經辦了，還有空位。’

ccb.text: 奴仆说，‘主人啊，我照你的吩咐办了，可是还有空位。’

csbs.text: “奴仆说：‘主人，你所吩咐的已经做了，可是还有位子。’
